prose: Fukui reactivity on acrolein (atom-condensed, Mulliken scheme) — DFT, tier standard (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, no density fitting) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: user-supplied acrolein.xyz, single-point without re-optimization. SCF converged for neutral singlet, cation doublet, and anion doublet. Most electrophilic site: atom 4 (Cβ) with f⁺ = 0.64232102. No warnings reported. Results written to acrolein_fukui_dft.json; plot at /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/acrolein/argo_o4-mini/20260704-044451_acrolein_fukui_reactivity/agent_call_01_plot.png; live log in fukui_<timestamp>.out.
